sources.name: Solano County Library
sources.notes: Communico tenant: solanolibrary. The fetcher auto-builds /eeventcaldata?req=… with today's date + windowDays and merges /v1/{tenant}/locations for branch geo.

sources.name: Sunnyvale Public Library
sources.notes: CivicPlus calendar (HTML table). Akamai blocks default fetcher headers — requiresBrowserHeaders sends a full Chrome header set (Sec-Fetch-* etc.) which is enough to clear the bot challenge.

sources.name: Santa Clara City Library
sources.notes: Same CivicPlus calendar markup as Sunnyvale; the requiresBrowserHeaders flag bypasses the Akamai 403.

sources.name: Santa Clara County Parks
sources.disabledReason: Official Santa Clara County Parks event page returns a Cloudflare challenge/block page to automated fetches in this environment.

sources.name: Ticketmaster Bay Area Family Events
sources.ticketmasterAllowedPattern: Family|Children|children under|Recommended ages?|Disney|Beauty And The Beast|Phantom Of The Opera|all guests require ticket
sources.notes: Runs when TICKETMASTER_API_KEY is present. Family classification alone is sparse in the Bay Area, so the source also uses narrow arts/theatre keyword queries and parser-side filters.

sources.name: Stanford Events
sources.notes: Official Stanford Localist calendar, narrowed to public arts, museum, tour, workshop, film, performance, and reception event types. The parser requires Everyone or General Public audience and filters out internal academic meetings.
